room.caption: [NightmareB1] Another Nightmare Gate. I don't know if that helps you, but for me it's the easiest of those.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(102) global.mapTeleport=2
abilSetRemove(1) global.hasShoes[0]=2 global.hasShoes[1]=2 global.hasAbilToken[1]=4 global.activeAbility[0]=1 charSwitcher(0)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates) roomControl=instance_create(0,0,oEvKeyControl) roomControl.progCheck=1000000
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(901) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=128 newMapY=160 toRoom=rMain_8Gate newDraw=1

bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=168 newMapY=288 toRoom=rExtGateB_6 newDraw=1 image_blend=c_maroon
var instrProg; instrProg=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,2) if instrProg!="7" and instrProg!="9" {instance_destroy()}
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=-2 shiftChange=56 spriteChange=10
